race.comment: EMPIRE OF ART (1) has been right there in all three outings this preparation and looks to be working up to another victory. Hails from the champion Chris Waller yard and appears to be very well placed against this line-up. Rates the testing material. CERTIFY (4) finally broke the maiden status last time out and will have taken a stack of confidence from that win. Can go back-to-back. SICILIAN WARRIOR (6) got a well-deserved win here at the latest effort and the step-up in trip should suit. Top-three aspirations. USE YOUR ILLUSION (3) will be ready to peak now fourth run back and looks one for the exotics players. BRAIN WAVE (7) next in line.
